name: Zentek Ltd.
description: Zentek Ltd. is an intellectual property development and commercialization company focused on the advancement of distinct brands in graphite, graphene-based coatings, and biosciences. Operating under a development-on-demand model, the company leverages its Albany Graphite deposit in Northern Ontario alongside its proprietary graphene nanomaterials and aptamer technologies. Zentek aims to address critical market needs across various sectors, including nuclear energy, defense, aerospace, HVAC, and healthcare, by building a deep science foundation that transforms raw materials into high-performance, patent-protected solutions for global industrial and medical applications.
